parameters.query:
=SELECT 
  id,
  purchase_type,
  expires_at,
  purchased_at,
  status
FROM user_purchases
WHERE user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'
  AND app_id = '{{ $json.app_id }}'
  AND status = 'APPROVED'
ORDER BY purchased_at DESC

=SELECT 
  id,
  is_active,
  expires_at,
  started_at
FROM user_trials
WHERE user_id = '{{ $('2. Extrair userId e appId').item.json.user_id }}'
  AND app_id = '{{ $('2. Extrair userId e appId').item.json.app_id }}'
  AND is_active = true
  AND expires_at > NOW()
ORDER BY started_at DESC

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "hasAccess": false,
  "accessType": null,
  "reason": "{{ $json.reason }}",
  "userId": "{{ $json.userId }}",
  "appId": "{{ $json.appId }}",
  "message": "Assinatura necessária para acessar esta aplicação",
  "timestamp": "{{ $json.debug.timestamp }}"
}
